item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan dan keseimbangan antara kepentingan masyarakat dan hak individu memang menjadi prioritas utama dalam sistem hukum dan budaya kita.

notes: Both agents engage directly in Indonesian. Agent A starts society-priority but softens into a balance frame while keeping collective impact central. Agent B stays rights-first but accepts limited, transparent legal restrictions for safety and public order. No full reversal is visible.
